sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ أَبُو سَمِيرٍ شِرَاءَ خُضَارٍ مِنَ السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Samirov otac je htio kupiti povrće s pijace.
sentences.translationEn: Samir's father wanted to buy vegetables from the market.

sentences.translation: Pijaca je bila gužvovita i glasovi su bili glasni.
sentences.translationEn: The market was crowded and the voices were loud.

sentences.arabic: قَارَنَ الأَسْعَارَ عِنْدَ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ بَائِعٍ.
sentences.translation: Usporedio je cijene kod više prodavača.
sentences.translationEn: He compared prices at more than one seller.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى مِنَ البَائِعِ الذِي عِنْدَهُ أَرْخَصُ سِعْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Kupio je od prodavača koji je imao najjeftiniju cijenu.
sentences.translationEn: He bought from the seller who had the cheapest price.
